nodes.label: AI Native Team
nodes.summary: A team model that treats models, context, and workflow as one operating system for delivery.

nodes.label: Execution Spec
nodes.summary: A reusable specification that binds task framing, context, policy, and review expectations together.

nodes.label: Context Budget
nodes.summary: Decision page that limits context sprawl and requires explicit budget ownership in prompts and tools.

nodes.label: Execution Policy
nodes.summary: Decision page that recommends treating context and execution as first-class platform capabilities.

nodes.summary: Saved query summarizing the defining traits of an AI native delivery team.

nodes.summary: Notes from an internal workshop on evaluation loops, review lanes, and release confidence.

nodes.summary: A source page describing why execution specs and context must be treated as one delivery system.
